description.ko: 지표면에 대한 고고도 지형 탐구로, 건조한 대지와 화산 열기 사이의 투쟁을 보여줍니다.
description.en: A high-altitude topographic exploration of the Earth's surface, showing the struggle between arid earth and volcanic heat.

prompt: A cinematic top-down satellite view of TERRA-1, showcasing a 'Geological Narrative of Time.' The scene features cracked #8B4513 burnt sienna clay merging into jagged #2F4F4F volcanic basalt ridges with glowing #D2691E magma veins. Intricate sediment layers and #F4A460 sandy topographic patterns reveal the ancient scars of the land. Macro-geological details, 8k resolution, natural lighting, capturing the raw, textured power of the Earth's crust.
